headline: PNC Q1 Deep Dive: Loan Growth, FirstBank Integration, and Strategic Expansion Signal Momentum
summary: Financial services giant PNC (NYSE:PNC) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 13% year on year to $6.19 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.32 per share was 3.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
